Emily Johnson
Phoenix, AZ

Summary
Dedicated and enthusiastic retail worker with over 5 years of customer service experience. Known for providing exceptional service and maintaining a positive shopping environment. Seeking to transition into a picker/packer role to leverage my attention to detail and organization skills in a fast-paced setting.

Experience
Sales Associate
Target, Phoenix, AZ
June 2020 - Present  
- Assisted customers in locating products and provided recommendations to enhance their shopping experience.  
- Maintained visual merchandising standards and organized sales floor to ensure a pleasant shopping environment.  
- Operated cash register and handled transactions accurately, maintaining a balanced cash drawer.

Barista
Starbucks, Phoenix, AZ
May 2018 - May 2020  
- Prepared and served beverages and food items while ensuring quality and presentation standards were met.  
- Provided prompt and friendly service to customers in a high-volume environment.  
- Trained new employees on proper procedures and customer service techniques.

Certifications
- Food Handler's Certificate, 2020  
- Customer Service Excellence Certification, 2019

- Strong communication and interpersonal skills
